'''kothachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:hzy|hzy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-th-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hzy|hzy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kothachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kothachithi|kothachithi]] || [[word:kothachiji|kothachiji]] || [[word:kothachishi|kothachishi]] || [[word:kothachiki|kothachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kothachuthuthu|kothachuthuthu]] || [[word:kothachujuju|kothachujuju]] || [[word:kothachushushu|kothachushushu]] || [[word:kothachukuku|kothachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kothachuthu|kothachuthu]] || [[word:kothachuju|kothachuju]] || [[word:kothachushu|kothachushu]] || [[word:kothachuku|kothachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kothachufthuf|kothachufthuf]] || [[word:kothachufjuf|kothachufjuf]] || [[word:kothachufshuf|kothachufshuf]] || [[word:kothachufkuf|kothachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kothachethe|kothachethe]] || [[word:kothacheje|kothacheje]] || [[word:kothacheshe|kothacheshe]] || [[word:kothacheke|kothacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kothachothotho|kothachothotho]] || [[word:kothachojojo|kothachojojo]] || [[word:kothachoshosho|kothachoshosho]] || [[word:kothachokoko|kothachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kothachotho|kothachotho]] || [[word:kothachojo|kothachojo]] || [[word:kothachosho|kothachosho]] || [[word:kothachoko|kothachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kothachofthof|kothachofthof]] || [[word:kothachofjof|kothachofjof]] || [[word:kothachofshof|kothachofshof]] || [[word:kothachofkof|kothachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kothachĂŻfthĂŻf|kothachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kothachĂŻfjĂŻf|kothachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kothachĂŻfshĂŻf|kothachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kothachĂŻfkĂŻf|kothachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kothachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|kothachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kothachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|kothachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kothachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|kothachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kothachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|kothachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kothachĂŻfthĂŻf|kothachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kothachĂŻfjĂŻf|kothachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kothachĂŻfshĂŻf|kothachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kothachĂŻfkĂŻf|kothachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kothachĂŻfthĂŻf|kothachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kothachĂŻfjĂŻf|kothachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kothachĂŻfshĂŻf|kothachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kothachĂŻfkĂŻf|kothachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kothachĂŠthĂŠ|kothachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:kothachĂŠjĂŠ|kothachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:kothachĂŠshĂŠ|kothachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:kothachĂŠkĂŠ|kothachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kothachathatha|kothachathatha]] || [[word:kothachajaja|kothachajaja]] || [[word:kothachashasha|kothachashasha]] || [[word:kothachakaka|kothachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kothachatha|kothachatha]] || [[word:kothachaja|kothachaja]] || [[word:kothachasha|kothachasha]] || [[word:kothachaka|kothachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kothachafthaf|kothachafthaf]] || [[word:kothachafjaf|kothachafjaf]] || [[word:kothachafshaf|kothachafshaf]] || [[word:kothachafkaf|kothachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kothachasha|kothachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kothachshĂ«sha|kothachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kothachrosha|kothachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kothachmusha|kothachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kothachyasha|kothachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokothachnkshĂ«sha|gokothachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokothachnkrosha|gokothachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokothachnkmusha|gokothachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokothachnkyasha|gokothachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kothathachasha|kothathachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kothathachshĂ«sha|kothathachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kothathachrosha|kothathachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kothathachmusha|kothathachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kothathachyasha|kothathachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokothathachnkshĂ«sha|gokothathachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokothathachnkrosha|gokothathachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokothathachnkmusha|gokothathachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokothathachnkyasha|gokothathachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kethĂŠchasha|kethĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kethĂŠchshĂ«sha|kethĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kethĂŠchrosha|kethĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kethĂŠchmusha|kethĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kethĂŠchyasha|kethĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokethĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gokethĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokethĂŠchnkrosha|gokethĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokethĂŠchnkmusha|gokethĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokethĂŠchnkyasha|gokethĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kothfachasha|kothfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kothfachshĂ«sha|kothfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kothfachrosha|kothfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kothfachmusha|kothfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kothfachyasha|kothfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokothfachnkshĂ«sha|gokothfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokothfachnkrosha|gokothfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokothfachnkmusha|gokothfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokothfachnkyasha|gokothfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
